project_context.target_audience: Factory supervisors, directors, planners in Indonesia
project_context.style: Professional industrial SaaS, SAP Fiori / Odoo Enterprise inspired

theme_and_archetype.vibe: Industrial, objective, rigid, functional, high-density data

rules: Do not use Inter for headings.
Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for large numbers/KPIs.
Data tables should use text-sm for density.
Labels and table headers should be uppercase, tracking-wider, text-xs, text-secondary.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Tight and dense, max utilization of screen real estate
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col for advanced span)
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, collapsible, w-64 expanded, w-16 collapsed. Background white, border-r border-border.
layout_and_spacing.header: Sticky top header, h-14, solid white, border-b border-border.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-border), no shadow or extremely subtle shadow-sm, rounded-md (max 6px radius).

components.kpi_cards: Use standard Shadcn Card. Padding p-4. Include Title (text-sm, text-secondary), Value (text-3xl, font-semibold, tracking-tight), and Trend Indicator (green/red arrow).
components.tables: Dense rows (py-2), sticky header, hover state on rows (hover:bg-slate-50). Use Shadcn Table.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Minimal grid lines (stroke-dasharray), use primary and secondary colors for bars/lines. Tooltips must be styled to match theme.
components.navigation: Use lucide-react icons. Active state: bg-blue-50 text-primary border-r-2 border-primary.
components.buttons: Shadcn standard. Primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover. Outline: border-border text-text_primary hover:bg-slate-50.

factory_background.description: Precast concrete factory building. Use for login background or empty state.

product_box_culvert.description: Concrete tunnel/culvert. Use as thumbnail for Box Culvert product.

user_avatar.description: Asian construction worker in yellow hard hat. Use for user profile avatar.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-dashboard').

instructions_to_main_agent: Create ALL components in .js files, not .tsx.
Implement a fully responsive sidebar (collapsible on desktop, drawer on mobile).
Use dummy data in Bahasa Indonesia (e.g., 'Target Produksi Hari Ini', 'Pipa Beton Bertulang', 'Stok Produk Jadi').
Avoid any purple or teal colors. Strictly adhere to the industrial blue/gray/white palette.
Use Shadcn UI components but customize their borders and shadows to be flatter, mimicking SAP Fiori.
Build at least the Dashboard view with KPI cards and Recharts (Production Trend, Monthly Production).
Ensure high data density: text-sm for tables and secondary information.
